headline: Trump 🍊🚫 YANKS Kushner-Witkoff Pakistan Iran Peace Trip 😤📵
text:
DONALD J TRUMP 🍊🦅, the BIGGEST BALLER 👑💪, just GHOSTED 👻🚫 a THICC US envoy squad to Pakistan 🕌🇵🇰 for Iran war chit-chat 💬⚔️! Special envoys STEVE WITKOFF 💼🤵 & JARED KUSHNER 👨‍💼🍆 (ya boyo Ivanka's hubbs 😍👰) were SET to jet in 🛫 but TRUMP SAID 'NAH FAM, TOO MUCH TIME WASTED ⏰💨 – IF IRAN WANTS TO TALK 🗣️, JUST HIT MY LINE 📞‼️!' Tehran mullahs 🕌😤 already BOUNCED from Islamabad like bad Tinder dates 👻📱 right before the cancelation – Iranian FM ABBAS ARAGCHI 🧔📢 spilled tea ☕ to Pakistan mediators: 'We DROPPED our END-THE-WAR PLAN 📜✌️ but is USA FOR REAL about diplomacy or just CAP 🧢😏?' 

Diplomatic DADDY DRAMA 👨‍⚖️💥 STALLED AF despite TRUMP extending ceasefire 🛑🔥 (was expiring April 22 📅) to keep the vibes going 🕺. Strait of Hormuz 🚢⛴️ LOCKDOWN: Iran BLOCKING oil tankers 🚫🛢️ cuz US/Israel STRIKES 💣🇮🇱 in Feb kicked off the beef 🌶️, plus Tehran's NUCLEAR GLOW-UP ☢️😈 ambitions! USA ramped up NAVY DADDIES 🚢🦅 in the strait (20% WORLD OIL 🛢️🌍 flows thru) to CHOKE Iranian exports like a bad ex 👊💸. White House hyped 'IRAN WANTS TO TALK 🗣️😘' on Friday but mullahs said 'NO DIRECT MEET, BRO 🚫🤝!' 

TRUMP on Axios 🎤: 'Ceasefire HOLDS 🛑✅, war resumption? HAVEN'T EVEN THOUGHT ABOUT IT YET 🤷‍♂️💭!' Truth Social RANT 📱🔥: 'Iran's LEADERSHIP in TOTAL CHAOS 🤹‍♂️😵 – INFIGHTING like WWE RAW 💥🥊, NOBODY KNOWS WHO'S BOSS, NOT EVEN THEM! WE HOLD ALL THE CARDS 🃏👑, THEY GOT ZIPPEROO 🪝🚫 – CALL US IF U WANNA CHAT ‼️‼️' VP JD VANCE 🥔🇺🇸 was ON STANDBY 📞⏳ to join if it POPPED OFF, but he LED round 1 this month and dipped – NO BREAKTHROUGH VIBES 🚫💥 expected! 

Iran Prez MASOUD PEZESHKIAN 🧔👑: 'We're OPEN to TALKS 🤝 but US BLOCKADES 🚫 & THREATS ☠️ are COCKBLOCKING real deets 😩!' Pakistan PM SHEBAZ SHARIF 🕌🤝 called Aragchi chats 'WARM & CORDIAL 🔥❤️' – dude's hopping to Oman 🕌 & Russia 🇷🇺 next, then BACK to Islamabad per state media 📺. Nuke beef? US/Israel SUSPICIOUS AF of Tehran's ATOM BOMB DREAMS 💣☢️ (they deny, say it's for JUICY ENERGY ⚡🍑, but uranium NEAR WEAPONS-GRADE 😈🔥)! 

SIDEBAR SLAUGHTER 💥: Israel 💣🇮🇱 BOOMED southern Lebanon killing 4 😢⚰️ per state news, IDF says Hezbollah 🚀😡 fired rockets – ceasefire? MORE LIKE CEASE-FAIL 🛑❌, both sides VIOLATING like drunk uncles at Thanksgiving 🍗🥴! Bibi NETANYAHU 📢👨‍💼 ordered 'VIGOROUS Hezbollah SMACKDOWNS 🥊🇱🇧' – regional HOT MESS 🔥🌍! Trump holding the LEASH 🐶💪, Iran SIMPS begging for scraps 🥺📞 – CALL DADDY OR BUST ‼️🍆
